raw_responses.title: Efficient Adaptation of Pre-trained Vision Transformer via Householder Transformation
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: PAID method decomposes weight into magnitude+direction, introduces learnable orthogonal matrix via Householder reflections to globally rotate direction while preserving pairwise angular structure.

raw_responses.title: Head-wise Shareable Attention for Large Language Models (EMNLP 2024)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: head-wise weight sharing with DirectShare (reuses pre-trained weights) and PostShare (post-train + constraint then share); empirical feasibility across LLM attention heads.

raw_responses.title: Head-wise Shareable Attention for LLMs (arxiv 2402.11819)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: 'sharing parameters across attention heads, with a specific focus on LLMs.' Memory-efficient via head parameter sharing.

raw_responses.title: Rethinking Attention Output Projection: Structured (2026/03)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: Walsh-Hadamard fixed parameter-free orthogonal transform; couples every head output with every other through fixed maximally spread orthogonal basis.

raw_responses.title: LESTD: LLM Compression via Learning-Based Subspace Tensor Decomposition
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: shared low-rank orthonormal subspace in which all heads represent compactly; sparsify core tensor with closed-form error control.

raw_responses.title: A Visual Guide to Attention Variants in Modern LLMs
